notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Brandon Nimmo out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Corey Seager batting, Josh Jung picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith pops out to third baseman Ryan McMahon.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen grounds out, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yankees challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Joc Pederson grounds out, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to pitcher David Bednar. Jake Burger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Jake Burger to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Jake Burger to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Trent Grisham batting, José Caballero picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Corey Seager.

notableEvents.label: Ben Rice GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Corey Seager to pitcher Jack Leiter. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Ben Rice out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Jake Burger to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
